items.title: Agar Tum Saath hote
items.text:
Tum,
Yeh khat main tumhe us lamhe se likh raha hoon
jahan zindagi apne sabse aham mod par khadi hai.
Ek aisa mod jahan se ya toh insaan apni duniya basa leta hai…
ya phir dheere dheere khud se hi bichhad jaata hai.
Ajeeb baat yeh hai ke iss daur mein
sab kuch mere haath mein hote hue bhi…
mera mustaqbil tumhari maujoodgi se juda mehsoos hota hai.
Main kaamyaab bhi ho sakta hoon.
Main har woh maqam hasil kar sakta hoon
jiska log sirf tasavvur karte hain.
Magar yeh bhi sach hai —
ke agar tum saath na hue,
toh shayad sab kuch paa kar bhi
andar se khaali reh jaunga.
“Kuch log naseeb nahi badalte,
Bas insaan ki himmat badal dete hain.”
Aur tum…
shayad meri himmat ho.
Aaj kal har cheez mumkin lagti hai,
magar har mumkin cheez ke peeche
tumhari ek chhoti si “haan” khadi nazar aati hai.
Jaise meri poori zindagi
ek dua ki tarah thehri hui ho…
aur us dua ka qubool hona
sirf tumhari awaaz ka mohtaaj ho.
Kabhi kabhi sochta hoon —
agar tum saath hote,
toh shayad main itna nahi thakta.
Itna nahi rukta.
Itna nahi toot-ta andar se.
Kyunki kuch log mohabbat nahi dete…
bas insaan ko yakeen de dete hain
ke woh haarne ke liye paida nahi hua.
“Tumhara saath mil jaata toh shayad yeh hota,
Ke main waqt se nahi… taqdeer se ladta.”
Tumhe maloom bhi nahi hoga,
magar mere andar kitni jang chalti rehti hai roz.
Ek taraf woh insaan hai
jo poori duniya jeetna chahta hai.
Aur doosri taraf woh khamoshi
jo sirf tumhari kami mehsoos karti hai.
Main aksar khud se kehta hoon —
ke mujhe kisi sahaare ki zarurat nahi.
Magar phir dil dheere se tumhara tasavvur kar leta hai…
aur meri saari zid toot jaati hai.
Sach kahun?
Mera urooj sirf meri mehnat par mabni nahi.
Kuch logon ki maujoodgi bhi insaan ko buland bana deti hai.
Aur tum unhi logon mein se ho.
Tum saath hote toh shayad
main zyada behtar likhta.
Zyada behtar jeeta.
Aur shayad…
khud ko itna tanha mehsoos na karta.
“Ek tera saath kya mila hota,
Main khud se bhi jeet gaya hota.”
Mujhe duniya ka darr nahi lagta.
Shikast ka bhi nahi.
Magar tumhara door rehna…
yeh cheez mujhe andar se kamzor kar deti hai.
Jaise kisi ne samandar se lehrein cheen li ho.
Ajeeb hai na?
Insaan poori duniya ke liye mazboot ban sakta hai,
magar ek shakhs ki khamoshi usse andar se gira deti hai.
Aur phir bhi…
main tum par bojh nahi banna chahta.
Main yeh nahi chahta ke tum majboori mein saath raho.
Bas itna chahta hoon —
ke agar kabhi meri taraf dekho,
toh samajh pao ke meri poori koshishon ke peeche
ek jagah tum bhi ho.
“Mera mustaqbil sirf meri mehnat se nahi juda,
Kuch duaein bhi chahiye hoti hain jeetne ke liye.”
Main jaanta hoon,
insaan ko khud chalna padta hai.
Magar kuch safar aise hote hain
jahan kisi ka saath
raaston se zyada zaroori lagne lagta hai.
Aur tum…
mera wahi safar ho.
Agar tum saath hote,
toh shayad main duniya ko alag nazar se dekhta.
Har shikast mukhtasar lagti.
Har mushkil halka bojh lagti.
Kyunki phir mujhe pata hota —
ke chahe duniya mere khilaaf ho,
koi ek shakhs hai
jo meri taraf khada hai.
“Insaan tab nahi jeetta jab woh taqatwar hota hai,
Insaan tab jeetta hai jab koi us par yaqeen karta hai.”
Aur shayad…
mujhe tumhare yaqeen ki zarurat hai.
Baaki sab toh mil hi jayega ek din.
Maqam bhi.
Izzat bhi.
Fatah bhi.
Bas afsos sirf itna rahega —
ke us fatah ke safar mein
agar tum saath na hue…
toh shayad woh fatah bhi adhoori lagegi.

Tumhara Thaka-Haara hua,
Intezaar mein
—
